blog.casual:
Write a casual, engaging blog post about {topic} that feels like a conversation with the reader. Requirements:
- Use friendly, approachable language
- Include personal anecdotes or examples
- Ask questions to engage readers
- Use subheadings for readability
- Keep paragraphs short
- Add humor where appropriate
- End with an invitation to comment or share
blog.educational:
Create an educational blog post about {topic} that teaches readers something valuable. Requirements:
- Start with a clear learning objective
- Break down complex concepts into simple terms
- Use examples and analogies
- Include step-by-step instructions if applicable
- Add visual description suggestions
- Provide additional resources
- End with a knowledge check or quiz questions

social.twitter:
Create {count} engaging tweets about {topic} for Twitter. Requirements:
- Max 280 characters each
- Include relevant hashtags: {hashtags}
- Add emojis for visual appeal
- Vary between questions, statements, and calls to action
- Thread tweets if needed for longer content
- Mention relevant accounts if appropriate
social.linkedin:
Write a professional LinkedIn post about {topic}. Requirements:
- Start with an engaging hook
- Share insights or lessons learned
- Use professional but approachable tone
- Include relevant hashtags
- Add a call to action for engagement
- Keep paragraphs concise
- End with a question to spark discussion
social.instagram:
Create an Instagram caption about {topic}. Requirements:
- Engaging opening line
- Tell a story or share value
- Use relevant emojis throughout
- Include 5-10 relevant hashtags
- Add a clear call to action
- Suggest image ideas in brackets
- Keep it authentic and relatable

email.newsletter:
Write a newsletter email about {topic}. Requirements:
- Engaging subject line (max 50 chars)
- Friendly greeting
- Value-packed content
- Clear sections with headings
- Personal touch
- Call to action
- Professional signature
- Unsubscribe reminder
email.promotional:
Create a promotional email for {product/service} about {topic}. Requirements:
- Attention-grabbing subject line
- Sense of urgency or exclusivity
- Clear benefits and features
- Social proof or testimonials
- Strong call to action
- Limited-time offer
- Professional design suggestions

product.standard:
Write a product description for {product} with these features: {features}. Requirements:
- Compelling title
- Benefit-focused description
- Key features list
- Technical specifications
- Use cases
- Target audience
- SEO optimization
- Call to purchase

ad.search:
Create search ad copy for {product/service} targeting {keywords}. Requirements:
- Multiple headline variations
- Description lines
- Display path
- Call to action
- Keyword insertion
- Ad extensions suggestions
- Landing page recommendations

script.youtube:
Write a YouTube video script about {topic}. Requirements:
- Hook in first 15 seconds
- Clear introduction
- Main content with timestamps
- Visual cues and B-roll suggestions
- Call to action
- End screen elements
- SEO optimized title and description
